title: Industrial Odyssey
description: 🔧 Industrial Odyssey is a private 1.20.1 modpack combining technology, exploration, and combat. Featuring Create for mechanical automation and Tacz for tactical gunplay, it also includes a custom economy system designed for multiplayer gameplay. Build, fi
body:
# 🔧 Industrial Odyssey [Minecraft 1.20.1]

**Industrial Odyssey is a private, multiplayer-oriented modpack that blends technology, exploration, and combat in a finely tuned adventure.**
**"pour les bros "**

### Built around two major mods:

⚙️ Create – for immersive, kinetic automation and mechanical creativity


🔫 Tacz – adding modern firearms and tactical combat dynamics

**Explore a richly modded world, automate massive systems, and engage in high-stakes battles using powerful ranged weaponry. The custom-built economy system encourages trading, cooperation—or domination—in a competitive multiplayer environment.**

Whether you're a builder, engineer, explorer, or sharpshooter, Industrial Odyssey offers a unique journey through machines, money, and mayhem.

when you join, buttons will be bugging but if you want to join the server, you can stil click on the yellow button. I'm actively working on this issue.

In the menu, You'll need to press Ctrl + alt + c and modify all you desire...

Feel free to join the discord if you want to play with others and ask questions !
https://discord.gg/4KFMavuWdW


PROUDLY Made by crimson.
